CustomField.description: Updated name to remover 'Operating'. At start of 2024 BD goal changed from GM to OM, then finance updated the GM calculation to be the same as OM and no longer reference OM separately.
CustomField.label: Total CORE Margin

summaryFilterItems.value: Emergency Medicine (EM), Hospital Medicine (HM), Free Standing ED (FSED), Integrated Care Physician (ICP), Intensive Care Unit (ICU), Urgent Care (UC), Behavioral Health
